subcodes.first_line: O Lion of Truth! The Lion of God must needs possess a prowess beyond description and a mighty strength, that in the meadowland [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسدالحق شیر حق را صولتی زائدالوصف لازم و قوتی شدید واجب تا در چمنستان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
